system.description:
Hooded robes are a common sight amongst Dark Angels. While they are most often worn by veterans and other high ranking warriors, Battle-Brothers of all ranks may be found wearing them. The exact reasons and hidden meanings of wearing such a robe are difficult to discern even for members of the Chapter.

Effect: Choose one Forbidden Lore skill and add +3 to all Tests on it.

Note: After adding this item to your character, edit the modifier to specify your chosen lore (e.g., change forbidden-lore-generic to forbidden-lore-xenos).
